gist.headline: Daily bulletin board refresh
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot just swept through the README, pinning up the latest news and community apps for everyone to see.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the repository README to feature the latest news and recent community applications.
gist.impact: Keeps the project's front page fresh and accurately reflects recent community contributions.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a librarian or archivist, updating a giant pixel-art bulletin board with new polaroids of community apps.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny reading glasses, pinning new pixelated polaroid photos to a wooden bulletin board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny reading glasses, pinning new pixelated polaroid photos to a wooden bulletin board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
